prompt: Create a cinematic premium product advertising image for MyThos, a luxury yerba mate package design inspired by Paraguayan forest legends. Scene: a dark rustic wooden tabletop against a smoky warm brown studio backdrop, dramatic low-key lighting, soft shadows, amber highlights, hyper-realistic commercial photography. Arrange exactly 7 visible product objects from left to right: 1 large front-facing black matte yerba mate bag, 1 narrow side-facing black bag showing side branding, 1 rear-facing black bag showing nutrition facts and barcode, 1 three-quarter angled black bag showing the front and right side, 1 tall green Stanley-style thermos with stainless steel cap on the far right, 1 dark worn mate gourd in front of the thermos filled with loose yerba, and 1 curved metal bombilla straw emerging from the gourd. Packaging details: all bags are glossy crinkled black kraft pouches with gold foil typography, ornate botanical borders, small tree emblem at the top, subtle forest leaves near the bottom, and mythical guardian character art. The main front bag should prominently read "MyThos" in large elegant serif gold lettering, with Spanish text "YERBA MATE", "ELABORADA CON PALO", and the slogan "LEYENDAS QUE VIVEN". The front artwork shows exactly 2 legendary forest guardian figures, one straw-covered Pombero-like figure and one long-haired pale Pora-like figure, standing in a dark jungle scene; include a round gold seal near the bottom and the label "POMBERO & PÓRA" plus "GUARDIANES DEL MONTE". The back-facing bag includes a centered nutrition information panel, exactly 3 small circular claim icons above it, paragraph text, a barcode at the bottom, and gold ornamental trim. The side-facing bag includes vertical layout branding, a small tree icon, short descriptive Spanish copy, and "POMBERO & PÓRA" near the bottom. Color palette: black, deep forest green, aged bronze, antique gold, warm brown wood, subtle cream text. Style: ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium beverage packaging mockup, sharp focus on products, shallow depth of field, no people, no hands, no extra props, no watermark. Use 1kg on the front lower corner and make the thermos label read STANLEY SINCE 1913.
